behavior_summary: This script implements Emrichol NPC event stubs that delegate almost all gameplay logic to shared SORCERER-class handlers and a spell-combat handler.

U8P_EMRICHOL::look, ::use, ::enterFastArea, and ::leaveFastArea prepare object context, mark the object as excluded from normal processing, push identifying data (including the literal "Emrichol") and spawn corresponding SORCERER handlers to perform the actual interaction/area behavior.
U8P_EMRICHOL::cast forwards a spell id and the actor/context to SPELCMBT::084D to perform the spell-casting mechanics.
After spawning the external handler the script frees any pushed string, processes the spawn return via an implies/pop pattern, and suspends — indicating a handoff of control to the spawned handler.
notable_control_flow: Each event handler sets per-object info (push indirect 02h) and sets a process-exclude before spawning an external handler — ensuring the object is in an appropriate state before delegation (high confidence).
Delegation pattern: spawn(external_handler, actor/context, pid, [optional string or spell id]) → free string if allocated → implies/pop retval → suspend; this repeats across events (high confidence).
No local game-state modifications or global flags are written by this script itself; it acts as a thin wrapper and delegator (high confidence).
open_questions: What exact semantics does the pushed object-info (push indirect 02h) encode for the SORCERER handlers? (inferred use but exact meaning unknown).
Which exact actor/process id is contained in [BP+06h] in all contexts — is it always the player Avatar or can it be other processes? (likely Avatar but not certain).
Are there additional side effects performed by the invoked SORCERER::039C / 05EC / 258C / 25D2 handlers that depend on other hidden object fields set elsewhere? (unknown).

main_function.name: U8P_EMRICHOL::look
main_function.purpose: Handle the player/actor looking at Emrichol by preparing object context and delegating the actual dialog/response to a shared SORCERER dialog/interaction handler.
entry_conditions: Event 0: triggered when the Avatar (or relevant actor) looks at or inspects the Emrichol NPC (inferred from standard 'U8P_EMRICHOL::look' event pattern).

function_map.name: U8P_EMRICHOL::look
function_map.role: Prepare context and delegate NPC 'U8P_EMRICHOL::look' interaction to SORCERER::039C

function_map.name: U8P_EMRICHOL::use
function_map.role: Prepare context and delegate 'use' interaction to SORCERER::05EC

function_map.name: U8P_EMRICHOL::enterFastArea
function_map.role: Prepare context and delegate fast-area entry behavior to SORCERER::258C

function_map.name: U8P_EMRICHOL::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: Prepare context and delegate fast-area exit behavior to SORCERER::25D2

function_map.name: U8P_EMRICHOL::cast
function_map.role: Forward spell-cast requests (uword spell id) to SPELCMBT::084D while preparing context

function_map.name: SORCERER::039C
function_map.role: External dialog/interaction handler invoked for 'U8P_EMRICHOL::look' (provided by shared SORCERER logic)

function_map.name: SORCERER::258C
function_map.role: External handler for fast-area entry events

function_map.name: SORCERER::25D2
function_map.role: External handler for fast-area exit events

function_map.name: SPELCMBT::084D
function_map.role: Spell-combat/casting handler invoked by the script's cast event

external_calls.purpose: Delegate the NPC 'U8P_EMRICHOL::look' (examine/dialog) behavior to the shared SORCERER handler; passes actor/context ([BP+06h]), pid, object info, and the string 'Emrichol'.
Delegate the 'use' interaction to SORCERER::05EC; passes actor/context, pid, object info, and 'Emrichol'.
Delegate fast-area entry logic to the SORCERER fast-entry handler; passes actor/context, pid, and object info.
Delegate fast-area exit logic to the SORCERER fast-exit handler; passes actor/context, pid, and object info.
Forward a spell-cast request including the uword spell id ([BP+0Ah]) and the actor/context to the spell-combat handler to perform casting mechanics.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements Emrichol NPC event stubs that delegate almost all gameplay logic to shared SORCERER-class handlers and a spell-combat handler.
